query:
SELECT 
  id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate, startTimeEst, gameStatus,
  awayBookSpread, homeBookSpread, awaySpreadOdds, homeSpreadOdds,
  bookTotal, overOdds, underOdds,
  awayML, homeML,
  openAwaySpread, openHomeSpread, openAwaySpreadOdds, openHomeSpreadOdds,
  openTotal, openAwayML, openHomeML,
  modelAwayPLOdds, modelHomePLOdds, modelTotal, modelAwayML, modelHomeML,
  modelAwayScore, modelHomeScore, modelOverRate, modelUnderRate,
  modelAwayWinPct, modelHomeWinPct,
  spreadDiff, totalDiff, spreadEdge, totalEdge,
  publishedToFeed, publishedModel
FROM games
WHERE sport = 'NHL' AND gameDate = '2026-03-25'
ORDER BY startTimeEst;
